articles.description: Manchester City were in a state of turmoil this time last year – staring at a first trophyless season since 2017 – but they are now in with a chance of a domestic treble.
articles.title: Man City 2-1 Southampton: Pep Guardiola's side go from trophyless to possible treble

articles.description: Arsenal deliver on Declan Rice's promise that the Premier League title race is "not done" with an important win over Newcastle.
articles.title: Arsenal 1-0 Newcastle: Gunners pick up important win in Premier League title race

articles.description: Fermin Lopez and Marcus Rashford score as Barcelona beat Getafe to move 11 points clear of Real Madrid in title race.
articles.title: Rashford scores as Barcelona close in on La Liga title

articles.description: Liverpool will have to "wait and see" whether Mohamed Salah has played his final game for the club, says manager Arne Slot.
articles.title: Mohamed Salah: Liverpool have to 'wait and see' how serious injury is

articles.description: Punjab Kings produce a stunning victory against Delhi Capitals by hunting down a target of 265 to record the highest successful run-chase in the history of T20 cricket.
articles.title: IPL 2026: Punjab Kings pull off record T20 chase to defeat Delhi Capitals

articles.description: Tottenham end their long wait for a Premier League win with victory at Wolves - lifting their survival hopes in the process.
articles.title: Wolves 0-1 Tottenham: Spurs earn big win in Premier League relegation fight

articles.description: Ronnie O'Sullivan leads John Higgins 6-2 after the opening session of their World Championship last-16 tie but Mark Williams, the other member of snooker's fabled 'Class of 92', is eliminated.
articles.title: Ronnie O'Sullivan leads John Higgins; Mark Williams loses to Barry Hawkins at World Snooker Championship

articles.description: On a day of twists and turns, Tottenham and West Ham both picked up crucial wins in their fight to avoid relegation.
articles.title: Tottenham & West Ham both win on day of Premier League relegation drama

articles.description: Arsenal have started moving for Maxi Araujo, Manchester United are planning a squad overhaul and Ederson is on the Red Devils' shortlist.
articles.title: Football gossip: Araujo, Ederson, Leao, Bergvall, Endrick, Reijnders

articles.description: England were feeling "muted" after beating Wales but the defending champions remain on course for an eighth straight title.
articles.title: Women's Six Nations: Why 'muted' England's Six Nations dominance remains a concern
